wpr_custom_css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Lato:ital,wght@0,100;0,300;0,400;0,700;0,900;1,100;1,300;1,400;1,700;1,900&display=swap'); .menu-item{ display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 10px; } li.wprm_before_menu_content{ width: 100%; height: auto; background: transparent; position:relative; overflow:hidden; margin-bottom: -20px !important; } .top-logo-container { background-image: url(/msmm_plaugin/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/graphic-showing-texthelper-icons-with-a-graduate-who-higher-education-hd-png-download-transparent-png-image-pngitem.png); text-align: center; background-size: cover; overflow: hidden; position: relative; padding: 10px 0 40px; } .top-logo-container:before { content: ''; background-color: #1e86f1db; height: 200px; position: absolute; width: 100%; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; } .top-logo-container .logo_bg{ background-color: #ffffff; border-radius: 100px; width: 80px; height: 80px; margin: 0 auto; position: relative; box-shadow: rgb(255 255 255) 0px 4px 20px; } .top-logo-container .logo_bg img{ padding-top: 9px; } .top-logo-container h4{ font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold; margin: 10px 0 0; position: relative; } .top-logo-container span{ font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; margin: 0px 0; position: relative; display: block; } ul#wprmenu_menu_ul{ display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; width: 100%; } ul#wprmenu_menu_ul li.menu-item.menu-item-type-post_type{ display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; position: relative; width: 130px; height: 100px; cursor: pointer; background: #ffffff; z-index: 100; transition: 150ms; margin:0px 0px 20px 13px; text-align: center; border-radius:10px; box-shadow: rgb(99 99 99 / 20%) 0px 2px 8px 0px; } ul#wprmenu_menu_ul li.menu-item.menu-item-type-post_type a{ font-size: 13px; color: #0c0303 !important; background: transparent; font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; } ul#wprmenu_menu_ul li.menu-item.menu-item-type-post_type a i{ color: #0c0303 !important; margin: 0 auto 5px auto; font-size: 30px !important; text-align: center; display: table; } li.wprm_after_menu_content { width: 100%; display: flex; margin-top: 20px !important; } li.wprm_after_menu_content .social-footer { display: inline-flex; margin: 0 auto; } li.wprm_after_menu_content .social-footer a{ padding: 0 5px; height: 35px; width: 35px; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo17 .menu-item { display: block !important; width: 100%; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo17 #mg-wprm-wrap { background-color: #256ea8; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo17 .cbp-spmenu-vertical, .wp-responsive-menu-demo17 li.wprm_after_menu_content{ width: 100% !important; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo17 #wprmenu_bar { background-color: #256ea8; max-width: 65px; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo17 #wprmenu_bar.wprmenu_bar.active{ max-width:400px; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo17 #wprmenu_bar .menu_title{ display: none; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo17 #wprmenu_bar .hamburger.hamburger--slider.is-active span.hamburger-box{ position: absolute; right:26px; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo17 .cbp-spmenu-vertical .top-logo-container .logo_bg { line-height: 66px; outline: 4px solid #2271afd4; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo17 ul#wprmenu_menu_ul { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-around; gap: 6px; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo17 ul#wprmenu_menu_ul li{ width: 130px; height: 100px; z-index: 100; border:none; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo17 ul#wprmenu_menu_ul li:first-child{ display: block; width: 100%; height: auto; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo17 #mg-wprm-wrap ul li{ border: 0 !important; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo17 ul#wprmenu_menu_ul li i._mi._before.dashicons{ margin: 0 auto 5px auto; font-size: 40px !important; text-align: center; display: table; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo17 ul#wprmenu_menu_ul li.menu-item.menu-item-type-post_type{ background: transparent !important; margin: 0; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo17 .top-logo-container h4{ color: #fff; font-size: 14px; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo17 .top-logo-container span, .wp-responsive-menu-demo17 #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul li.menu-item a, .wp-responsive-menu-demo17 #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul li.menu-item.menu-item-type-post_type a i{ color: #fff !important; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo17 .top-logo-container h4:nth-child(3){ font-weight: normal; font-size: 16px; margin: 0; color: #ffffffba; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo17 #mg-wprm-wrap li.menu-item a { font-size: 15px !important; text-transform: capitalize !important; font-weight: 500 !important; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo17 #mg-wprm-wrap li.menu-item a span{ display: block; text-align: center; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo17 #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul li.current-menu-item > a, .wp-responsive-menu-demo17 #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul li.current-menu-item > a:hover { background: #fff !important; color:#256ea8 !important; border-radius: 8px; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo17 #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul li.current-menu-item.menu-item.menu-item-type-post_type > a i{ color: #256ea8 !important; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo17 li.wprm_after_menu_content .social-footer a{ margin: 0 10px; } .wp-responsive-menu-demo17 .social-footer .social-icon svg{ height: 35px; width: 35px; }
